prompt: Assess how far along the work is, the percent complete, any defects, and the remaining work.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The work under review is Rebar placement, part of the Structural & Ironwork scope. The observed field condition is: missing chairs/supports (mat on dirt). The work is roughed in — installed or assembled, but not yet closed out. Reference material on hand: ACI 318, ACI 117, placing drawings. Treat this as roughly 70 percent complete until defects are corrected.
title: Progress assessment: Rebar placement (commercial project)
